boonCookieDescription: Earn $1 at end of round. Increases by $2 when a Boss is defeated
boonAllinDescription: Adds X4 Mult on final move of round
boonOffgridDescription: Añade <point>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Points</point> al final de cada jugada (un punto por casilla)
boonClickbaitDescription: Añade <multi>+2 Multi</multi> por cada relanzamiento de la tienda en esta partida (actualmente <multi>+${arg:scoreCalculationValue1} Multi</multi>)
